title: ADEPTNA 3.6L Drink Dispenser Tap, Handle, Screw Top Lid & 4 Tumblers Beverage Container for Juice Cocktails Lemonade Infused Drinks Summer Party BBQ Water Dispenser Leakproof Spigot Handle (Green)
features: 𝐃𝐑𝐈𝐍𝐊 𝐃𝐈𝐒𝐏𝐄𝐍𝐒𝐄𝐑 𝐒𝐄𝐓 𝐖𝐈𝐓𝐇 𝐓𝐔𝐌𝐁𝐋𝐄𝐑𝐒 – This ADEPTNA bundle is the perfect drinkware set for summer parties, barbecues, picnics, festivals, and family get-togethers because it comes with high-quality 3.6L drink dispensers and four matching tumblers

𝐋𝐀𝐑𝐆𝐄 𝟑.𝟔𝐋 𝐂𝐀𝐏𝐀𝐂𝐈𝐓𝐘 𝐃𝐈𝐒𝐏𝐄𝐍𝐒𝐄𝐑 – You can serve cocktails, lemonade, sangria, iced tea, fruit-infused water, soft drinks, and more with these dispensers, which hold 3.6 litres of your favourite beverages, measuring 27cm height and 13.5cm diameter. Ideal for kids and adults alike, it makes sure that everyone stays hydrated in style!

𝐋𝐄𝐀𝐊𝐏𝐑𝐎𝐎𝐅 𝐓𝐀𝐏 & 𝐄𝐀𝐒𝐘 𝐏𝐎𝐔𝐑𝐈𝐍𝐆 – Our drink dispenser is smooth-pull spigot and integrated rubber seal guarantee a mess-free, leak-proof pouring experience. You always get a controlled flow whether you're serving drinks at a party or keeping them in the refrigerator.

𝐃𝐔𝐑𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄, 𝐁𝐏𝐀-𝐅𝐑𝐄𝐄 & 𝐑𝐄𝐔𝐒𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 – This drink dispenser set is lightweight, long-lasting, and made of premium food-grade plastic that is BPA-free. When compared to single-use beverage containers, the reusable design makes it more economical and environmentally friendly.

𝐖𝐈𝐃𝐄 𝐒𝐂𝐑𝐄𝐖-𝐓𝐎𝐏 𝐋𝐈𝐃 𝐅𝐎𝐑 𝐄𝐀𝐒𝐘 𝐑𝐄𝐅𝐈𝐋𝐋𝐈𝐍𝐆 – Cleaning and refilling are made simple by the wide-mouth screw-top lid. For tasty, refreshing drinks, just add ice, fruits, or herbs. Pouring from the top is simple and hassle-free if ingredients obstruct the tap.
